abilities.effect:
This Pokémon cannot be poisoned.  This includes bad poison.

If a Pokémon is poisoned and acquires this ability, its poison is healed; this includes when regaining a lost ability upon leaving battle.

abilities.shortEffect: Halves damage from Fire and Ice moves.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon takes half as much damage from Fire- and Ice-type moves.

abilities.shortEffect: Makes the Pokémon eat any held Berry triggered by low HP below 1/2 its max HP.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon eats any held Berry triggered by low HP when it falls below 50% of its HP, regardless of the Berry's usual threshold.
